pins.name: The Divine Forest
pins.desc:
A forest of bright purple pine trees. It is fed directly by the divine river and as such grows incredibly rapidly and is intensely magical. It is easy to get lost. the fog/mist that is generated in the forest has a chance to drive people mad if they stay too long or wander too deep.

The cult of the dragon has a fortress deep in the forest where they are working on summoning Tiamat.

pins.name: The Divine River
pins.desc: A river of beautiful cyan water. It originates high in the mountains surrounding the ramnus wastes. The divine barony of Bastion's Hope was established to try and fix the corruption of the waters. so they don't pollute the northern area.

pins.name: The Divine Baronies
pins.desc:
The divine baronies were a set of cities established near the end of the godwars. An associate of the godslayers named Glib Steelsole, saw cataclysmic events happening after the rest of the gods were slain so he broke off from the group with all of the refugees they had taken in. He spent the last several months before the final conflict happened establishing 5 fortified zones in the mountains. He told these 5 cities that he had forseen a prophecy about how to save the world, and came up with a dummy religion about a bloodline that will eventually save the world. And that the savior will some point be born in one of their cities so they all needed to stay as safe as possible and take care of everyone they could. 
Original Baronies:
Past's Dreams.   Present's Strength.   Future's Trust.   Bastion's Hope.   Treasure's Rest.

Restwatch and Faith's Stand were created to help forge an alliance with the orcs and to assist in their goal.

The original call for help against the undead came from Present's Strength. intense divination magic broadcast their call across the ocean

pins.name: The platinum egg
pins.desc: A mysterious dragon egg platinum in color. It communicates telepathically and is running the thieves guild in this port. Has been an egg for at least 80 years.

pins.name: Gildor the Faithless
pins.desc: A white dragon attempting to harness the power of divinity to become powerful enough to challenge gods. Has a monastery where it trains. Routinely patrols the ocean nearby and will kidnap/save people who get caught in the storms.

pins.name: Grombalor the bronze
pins.desc:
An ancient dragon that is almost always in a dragonborn form. Old and weak but continues a constant fight against the forces of the ramnus wastes. Has not slept for 30 years. Has an army of volunteers. Those who devote themselves to the army and die in service are entombed in the fortress and able to be summoned as a ghost once a day who cannot move more than a mile or two from the castle. or as a revenant just once. 

Grombalor's fortress is supplied mainly by the orcs and halflings from the orcish freelands.

pins.name: Branthon the Green
pins.desc: Branthon is a half-dragon who is guildmaster of the Silvermoon Adventurists. He is at the infancy of a centuries long plan to slowly fix the world after the cataclysms of the god slaying. First step is gathering a large group of strong individuals who want to help keep the area safe. He will eventually help seal the ramnus wastes once there is a team strong enough to be trusted with the task. Lives in acorn forest and plants a new ent every full moon. Slowly growing the forest while also creating an army of ents that are able to keep people safe.

pins.name: Dimra the Blue
pins.desc:
Blue dragon pirate queen. Her lair is where the lava from the lava swamp reaches the ocean. The whole area is shrouded in steam hiding the cave system she calls home. The lava cools quickly but is still quite soft for some time allowing her to shape the lair how she sees fit. Her spells allow her ships not to get damaged by the steam/heat. Her crew is mainly goblins and sea dwarves that work mainly with clay. but she does have a population of merfolk/sahuagins that live in the underwater portions of her lair. They have been warped by the lava leyline so they can survive in the heat.

Incredibly dangerous, and very well known but nobody has been willing to attack her in her home due to the dangerous conditions.

pins.name: Vexeldrib the copper
pins.desc:
Vexeldrib is a large young copper dragon that is trying to stay hidden and lowkey in the savage valley. He has found that the creatures in the valley make him grow much larger and faster than normal. Due to being a copper dragon he can always tune into radio signals even without a set up from farther away than anybody else could pick up a signal. letting him sit in and listen to magical classes from the wizards college. He transforms into an elven form to attend classes in person. 

He has claimed an abandoned destroyed town as his lair and gained a few followers from adventurers willing to get their hands dirty. They think hes just an elf who has a dragon nearby.

history.desc:
